title: Better Breeds
description: Bring the common household dog breeds into your game!
body:
Give your wolves a realistic makeover with this Better Breeds Resource Pack! This pack replaces all 9 Minecraft wolf variations with detailed textures inspired by real-life dog breeds, bringing more personality and realism to your adventures.

Each biome wolf now resembles a unique breed, including the Great Pyrenees, German Shepherd, Husky, Saint Bernard, Bernese Mountain Dog, Akita, German Pointer, Boxer (brindle), and Great Dane.

Whether you're exploring snowy mountains or dense forests, you'll encounter dogs that feel like true companions rather than ordinary wolves. Perfect for players who love dogs and want their loyal Minecraft friends to look a little more like real-life best friends.
